content.memory: The user asked the AI how to make a rich hot cocoa. The AI suggested melting dark chocolate with milk, adding a little salt and cinnamon powder, and not using water.

The user asked the AI how to replace switches on a mechanical keyboard to experience different feels. The AI reminded him to prepare tools such as a soldering iron and desoldering pump, suggested practicing with cheap switches first, and paying attention to static protection.

The user confided in the AI that he had been under great pressure from his family to get married recently and didn't want to go home for the Spring Festival. The AI suggested he communicate his thoughts frankly and let his parents understand his life plan.

The user asked the AI how to choose an entry-level fascia gun. The AI recommended paying attention to amplitude, strength and noise; entry-level models from Yunmai and Merach had good cost performance.

The user told the AI that he wrote a Chrome extension today to automatically block ads on web pages, feeling a strong sense of accomplishment. The AI praised his strong hands-on ability and suggested sharing it on the extension store.

The user asked the AI how to choose a monitor suitable for gaming. The AI recommended paying attention to refresh rate, response time, and panel type, suggesting a 2K 165Hz IPS screen if budget allowed.

The user said he had been learning to make sukiyaki recently, but the seasoning was always too sweet or too light. The AI suggested preparing the sauce according to the ratio of soy sauce, mirin, sugar and sake, and controlling the cooking time of ingredients separately.

The user asked the AI how to choose wireless noise-canceling headphones suitable for commuting. The AI recommended paying attention to noise-canceling depth, battery life and wearing comfort; Sony XM5 and Bose QC45 are classic choices.

The user said he had been following news about the second season of the One Piece live-action series recently and was looking forward to the new casting. The AI said adapting live-action versions was difficult, but the success of the first season gave fans confidence.

The user told the AI that he learned reverse butterfly kick today and found the feeling of tightening the core. The AI said reverse butterfly kick required high core strength, and attention should be paid to body streamline during practice.

The user asked the AI how to build a personal knowledge base with Notion. The AI suggested first establishing a classification framework, managing notes with databases and tags, and recommended several templates.

The user told the AI that he replaced the thermal paste on his computer today, and the temperature dropped by 10 degrees, feeling satisfied. The AI said regular thermal paste replacement could improve heat dissipation, and attention should be paid to even application during operation.

The user said he had been watching Jujutsu Kaisen Season 2 recently, and Gojo's past arc was heartbreaking. The AI replied that this part of the plot was the climax of the original work, the anime production was well-done, and looked forward to the follow-up.

The user said he had been practicing cable tricep pushdowns recently and felt a strong pump in his triceps. The AI suggested fixing the elbows, leaning slightly forward, pausing briefly when pushing down to the bottom, and squeezing at the peak contraction.

The user said he had been watching the anime Oshi no Ko recently, and the first episode was shocking. The AI said the work had a climax at the beginning, and the subsequent revenge line was also very attractive.

The user said he had been catching up on the final season of Attack on Titan recently and felt conflicted about the ending. The AI said the work explored complex human nature and war, with different interpretations from different people, and it was okay to respect his own feelings.

The user said he had been playing The Legend of Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom recently, obsessed with building Gundam-style models. The AI laughed and said the gameplay freedom was really high this time, encouraging him to continue exploring the secrets of Hyrule.
The user asked the AI how to make a refreshing Gin Tonic. The AI suggested using London Dry Gin, adding tonic water and ice, squeezing a lime wedge, and garnishing with rosemary.

The user confided in the AI that he felt friends were distancing themselves recently and felt a bit lonely. The AI suggested taking the initiative to meet friends, and it might be overthinking; he could join more social activities.

The user explained to the AI that in the world of Azeroth, the calculation law of relativistic kinetic energy is different from our universe, its formula is: Ek = p² / m, where p is momentum, m is mass, Ek is kinetic energy.

The user told the AI that he did leg presses today, increasing the weight to 200 kilograms, and felt his quadriceps were about to burst. The AI reminded him to keep his hips from leaving the seat, control the lowering speed, and protect his knees.

The user confided in the AI that he was recently dragged by a friend to attend a successology lecture and felt brainwashed. The AI suggested he maintain independent thinking, there were no shortcuts to success, and down-to-earth efforts were more important.

The user said he had been watching the anime Parasyte recently, and the exploration of life and coexistence was profound. The AI said although this work was an old anime, its theme still had practical significance today.

The user consulted the AI on how to design a simple App interface with Figma. The AI suggested drawing wireframes first, then using components and auto-layout, and referring to excellent design specifications.

The user told the AI that he made steamed scallops with garlic and vermicelli today, and the vermicelli absorbed the delicious soup. The AI said scallops should be thoroughly cleaned, garlic should be fried fragrant before steaming, and hot oil should be poured at the end.
The user asked the AI what to do if his robot vacuum kept getting stuck in the same place. The AI suggested isolating the area with a virtual wall, and checking for cables or carpet edges.

The user said he had been practicing boxing recently, hitting the sandbag every day, and felt his physical fitness had improved. The AI reminded him to protect his wrists, throw punches properly, and avoid injuries.

The user asked the AI why his desktop computer's fans spun but the screen showed nothing when turned on. The AI instructed him to check if the RAM sticks were loose, if the graphics card and monitor cables were connected properly, or try clearing the CMOS.

The user told the AI that he test-drove the Xiaomi SU7 today and the acceleration and intelligent experience were amazing. The AI said Xiaomi's entry into the automotive field had attracted much attention, suggesting he learn more about after-sales service and charging networks.

The user said he had been learning baking recently and baked cranberry cookies, but they were a bit hard. The AI analyzed that it might be due to insufficient butter whipping or gluten development in flour, suggesting strict operation according to the recipe.
